title: Windows PowerShell Suspicious Script Block
description: Detects PowerShell Operational Event ID 4104 script blocks containing download cradles, AMSI bypass attempts, encoded payload handling, or Invoke-Expression execution.
query: 'Log Source' = 'Windows PowerShell Operational Logs' and 'Event ID' = '4104' and ('Script Block Text' like '*IEX*' or 'Script Block Text' like '*Invoke-Expression*' or 'Script Block Text' like '*DownloadString*' or 'Script Block Text' like '*FromBase64String*' or 'Script Block Text' like '*AmsiUtils*' or 'Script Block Text' like '*ExecutionPolicy Bypass*') | stats count as ScriptBlocks, unique('Script Block Text') as ScriptSamples, unique('Host Application') as HostApplications by User, 'Host Name (Server)', Entity | sort -ScriptBlocks
falsepositives: Security automation and administrative PowerShell frameworks
